steps.title: Use the elaboration after researchers
steps.content: The first clause says the study reflects contributions from multiple researchers. What follows identifies how that is true: Rivera is listed first, while Hosseini, Restrepo, and others also contributed.

steps.title: Choose punctuation for explanation
steps.content: A uses only a semicolon and loses the explaining relationship. B uses a comma where a stronger introducer is needed. C separates the ideas too sharply. The needed punctuation introduces an elaboration while preserving the contrast introduced by while. The answer is D.
